title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Taj SATS Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Taj SATS Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj SATS Digital Technologies:
Taj SATS Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS Digital Technologies!
